title: 💭 Surreal Numbers (Infinite Between Infinities)
name: Surreal Numbers (Infinite Between Infinities)
what_it_is: An extended number system that includes all real numbers, infinitesimals, and transfinite numbers—creates an infinite scaffolding of magnitude and subtlety.
how_to_use: her eyes shimmer with surreal values—realities nested between infinities
his aura spirals through infinitesimal logic—each layer a ghost between known numbers
animation_behavior: Scales shift subtly, forms stretch into unreachable smallness or vastness, particles pulse in infinitesimal patterns ---
